nodes.name: 索马里
nodes.summary: 索马里是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联143种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Yellow-necked spurfowl等143种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Somali crombec
nodes.summary: The Somali crombec (Sylvietta isabellina) is a species of African warbler, formerly placed in the family Sylviidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, and Tanzania. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. A subspecies gaekwari described by R.B. Sharpe and named after the Maharaja of Baroda Sayajirao Gaekwad III is considered to be indistinguishable from the nominate form. References
